data.title: Central Arizona Irrigation and Drainage District Secures Up to 10,000 Acre-Feet Per Year of New Water Supply from Mojave Groundwater Bank
data.description: In an effort to enhance water reliability in Arizona, the Central Arizona Irrigation and Drainage District (CAIDD) and Cadiz, Inc. have signed a Memorandum of Understanding (MOU). The agreement, finalized on July 2, 2026, aims to provide new water supplies to support long-term water security in the region. Cadiz, Inc., listed on the NASDAQ as CDZI and CDZIP, partnered with CAIDD to ensure sustainable water resources for the community. This collaboration signifies a crucial step towards addressing water challenges and promoting environmental sustainability.

data.title: Direxion Readies Launch of SKHL, 2X Daily Exposure to SK hynix
data.description: SKHL, a manufacturer specializing in semiconductors, is continuing Direxion's strong presence in leveraged and inverse ETFs related to this industry. On July 2, 2026, in New York, Direxion, well-known for offering ETFs suited for tactical traders, submitted paperwork to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission to introduce the Direxion Daily SK Hynix Bull 2X ETF. This move exemplifies their commitment to providing investment options for traders seeking amplified returns in the semiconductor market.

data.title: UrbanGeekz CEO Kunbi Tinuoye Joins TechLifeSteph To Discuss AI And Entrepreneurship
data.description: Founder and CEO Kunbi Tinuoye of UrbanGeekz engaged in a comprehensive discussion with TechLifeSteph host Stephanie Humphrey from WURD. The conversation delved into topics such as artificial intelligence, entrepreneurship, the future of digital media, and various recent industry stories. The interview took place in Philadelphia on July 2, 2026.

data.title: NMI Holdings, Inc. to Announce Second Quarter 2026 Financial Results on July 30, 2026
data.description: In Emeryville, California on July 2, 2026, NMI Holdings, Inc. is set to release its second-quarter results for the period ending June 30, 2026 after the market closes on Thursday, July 30, 2026. NMI Holdings, Inc. operates as the parent company of National Mortgage Insurance Corporation, known as National MI, and is listed on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol NMIH. Investors and market observers can anticipate an update on the company's performance for this quarter on the specified date.

data.title: Robbins LLP Reminds UP Stockholders of its Investigation into Wheels Up Experience Inc; Contact the Firm for Information
data.description: A law firm, Robbins LLP, is currently investigating Wheels Up Experience Inc. (NYSE: UP) to assess potential violations of securities laws and breach of fiduciary duties by certain officers and directors. This investigation is focusing on determining if shareholders of the company have been adversely affected. The inquiry is based on concerns regarding the conduct of key individuals within Wheels Up Experience Inc., with specific attention on potential legal and ethical breaches.

data.title: European Inventor Award 2026 winners announced: Honouring the innovators shaping tomorrow
data.description: Today in Berlin, the European Patent Office (EPO) honored inventors at the European Inventor Award 2026 ceremony for their contributions to addressing worldwide challenges in healthcare, energy, food systems, and digital technologies. The distinguished winners, hailing from various fields, were recognized for their remarkable innovations.

data.title: California Pizza Challenge Returns to Anaheim This August with National Recognition, Cash Prizes and a Trip to Italy on the Line
data.description: On July 2, 2026, WTWH Media revealed the launch of registration for The California Pizza Challenge as part of the Pizza Tomorrow Summit in Anaheim from August 23-25. WTWH, a renowned B2B media and marketing firm, organized the event. The challenge aims to bring together pizza enthusiasts to showcase their skills. The participants can compete in various categories and win prizes. The event provides a platform for networking and exploring the latest trends in the pizza industry. Interested individuals can register to participate in the competition and attend the summit.

data.title: Evolv Launches Evolv Grow, a Next-Generation Oral GHK-Cu Hair Growth Supplement for Men and Women Powered by EV2 Peptide™
data.description: The new Evolv Grow product has been launched after a 12-week study. It is now being sold on EvolvLife.com and at the Equinox Hotel Spa in New York City. The study was conducted with a placebo as a control. The wellness company Evolv, known for its development of the first orally bioavailable GLP-1 biomimetic peptide, made the announcement on July 2, 2026, in New York.

data.title: Kasinohai Audit: Most Slots Could Be Affected by Finland's Draft Gambling Rules
data.description: Recent research by Kasinohai reveals that a key element of contemporary slot games may conflict with Finland's upcoming gambling regulations. Additionally, an analysis of live casino platforms indicates that another common feature may face scrutiny. The study, based in Helsinki, presents crucial findings impacting the industry.

data.title: After Durnell: Why the Fight Against Pesticides and their Health Harms Is Entering a New Chapter
data.description: A recent study conducted by the Center for Food Safety in Washington released on July 2, 2026, indicates that over 200,000 individuals in the United States have filed lawsuits against Monsanto, claiming that the use of their Roundup pesticide has led to the development of cancer. These legal actions involve a diverse group of plaintiffs including farmers, groundskeepers, landscapers, and homeowners who have utilized the product for maintaining their own lawns.

data.title: Why the Smartest Brands Now Run Like Television Shows
data.description: Santa Monica, California, on July 2, 2026 – A recent analysis by creative studio della delves into the role of showrunners in prestige television series. The study highlights the common occurrence of showrunners whose names remain unknown to most viewers. These individuals, distinct from the lead actors and episode directors, play a crucial role in shaping the overall direction of the show.

data.title: This Independence Day Home Sellers Get a New Kind of Freedom
data.description: Atlanta, July 2, 2026 - Showings Realty is set to unveil a fresh approach to selling homes this Fourth of July weekend, coinciding with the celebration of American independence. This innovative real estate model aims to liberate homeowners from conventional listing fees. Taking a revolutionary stance, Showings Realty is pioneering a fee-free system in the real estate industry, offering a truly independent option for sellers.

data.title: Strategic Partnership Between Record Asset Management and Admicasa
data.description: Based in London, RAM Swiss Holding AG, a subsidiary of Record Financial Group, which is listed on the LSE, and a part of the Record Asset Management (RAM) group, has recently entered into a partnership with Admicasa. This merger marks a significant development, signaling the continued growth of Record's private markets platform. The agreement, formalized on July 1, 2026, grants RAM Swiss Holding AG a 50% stake in Admicasa Fondsleitung AG, a crucial move subject to regulatory approval. This collaboration underscores an essential milestone in both companies' strategic expansion plans.
